---
title: "Shiny UI Mockup for RAG Wikipedia App"
format: html
editor: source
runtime: shiny
---

```{r setup}
library(shiny)
library(shinythemes)
library(DT)
```

# Shiny UI Mockup (Frontend Only)

This is a **frontend mockup only** — it does not run the full RAG system yet.  
It still needs to connect server logic, RAG functions, and API calls later.

```{r}
ui <- fluidPage(
  theme = shinytheme("flatly"),

  # App Title
  titlePanel("Wikipedia RAG Explorer"),

  sidebarLayout(
    # ----- Sidebar -----
    sidebarPanel(
      textInput(
        inputId = "user_query",
        label = "Ask a question:",
        placeholder = "e.g., What is retrieval-augmented generation?"
      ),

      actionButton(
        inputId = "submit_query",
        label = "Run RAG",
        class = "btn-primary"
      ),

      hr(),

      sliderInput(
        inputId = "top_k",
        label = "Number of documents to retrieve:",
        min = 1,
        max = 10,
        value = 3
      ),

      helpText(
        "This interface will send your query to the RAG backend when connected."
      )
    ),

    # ----- Main Panel -----
    mainPanel(
      tabsetPanel(
        id = "tabs",

        # Retrieved Context
        tabPanel(
          "Retrieved Passages",
          br(),
          DTOutput("retrieved_table")
        ),

        # LLM Response
        tabPanel(
          "LLM Answer",
          br(),
          uiOutput("llm_answer_box")
        ),

        # Raw JSON / Debug
        tabPanel(
          "Debug Output",
          verbatimTextOutput("debug_output")
        )
      )
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  # ---- Placeholder Data Outputs ----
  output$retrieved_table <- renderDT({
    datatable(
      data.frame(
        Rank = integer(),
        Title = character(),
        Text = character(),
        Score = numeric()
      ),
      options = list(pageLength = 5)
    )
  })

  output$llm_answer_box <- renderUI({
    div(
      style = "padding:20px; background-color:#f7f7f7; border-radius:8px;",
      h4("LLM Response Placeholder"),
      p(
        "Your LLM-generated answer will appear here once the backend is connected."
      )
    )
  })

  output$debug_output <- renderText({
    "Backend debug output will show here."
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
